runtime_conversion_notes: Native sherpa-onnx streaming CTC (T-one Russian) ONNX artifact loaded directly by the OnlineRecognizer toneCtc model field on the v1.13.2 Android runtime (libsherpa-onnx-jni.so / libonnxruntime.so, arm64-v8a). No format conversion required.
notes: RU primary A2 demo model. Streaming CTC, single model.onnx + tokens.txt. Upstream: github.com/voicekit-team/T-one (Apache-2.0). Downloaded to device, NOT bundled in the APK. A2 demo evidence is not a launch-support claim; support matrix still requires WS6 benchmark evidence.
